category_sources: source_facts.description says lightweight RDF triplestore powered by Redland; official README says RedStore is a lightweight RDF triplestore in C using Redland.
display_name_sources: Official README heading uses RedStore; source_facts.name is redstore.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage, features, requirements, and installation; README points to the aelius.com RedStore page for latest version.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub README for njh/redstore identifies RedStore and links to the official aelius.com page.
tags_sources: Official README says RedStore supports SPARQL query/protocol standards, RDF formats, and Redland storage modules; source_facts identifies the redstore executable.
